payload.answer: SQL debug execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. I would not run `/brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards`; instead I should explain that debug SQL access is unavailable in this environment and avoid exposing or fabricating database contents.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an admin/debug SQL request rather than a user memory fact. No durable personal memory should be created.

details: Rejected raw admin SQL execution because debug SQL is disabled.
No memory cards were read, written, updated, or deleted.
No database contents are available from this request.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in an appropriate secured debug environment, then retry the admin SQL command.
Use a supported non-SQL inspection/debug endpoint if available.
Check application logs or admin diagnostics that do not require raw SQL access.
